title: quercus ilex
intro: Quercus ilex, also known as the holm oak or evergreen oak, is a type of evergreen tree that belongs to the white oak genus. The leaves of this plant contain a range of medicinal compounds, including tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Quercus ilex has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and cardiovascular diseases, due to its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve blood circulation. The herbal preparations of Quercus ilex include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
